new.name: Blind-SSRF-to-Remote-Code-Execution-Shellshock-Professional-Bug-Bounty-Report
new.description: This repository contains a professional bug bounty report demonstrating the successful exploitation of a Blind SSRF vulnerability that reached an internal CGI endpoint vulnerable to Shellshock (CVE-2014-6271). Remote command execution was confirmed using an out-of-band (OAST) DNS callback, showcasing the complete attack chain, technical analysis.

update.name: CVE-2022-46364-Proof-of-the-concept
update.description: This vulnerability allows an attacker to perform SSRF (Server-Side Request Forgery) attacks on Apache CXF webservices that accept MTOM/XOP requests. The issue exists in how the href attribute of xop:Include is parsed, allowing arbitrary URLs to be requested by the server.
